# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

We as members, contributors, and leaders pledge to make participation in our
community a harassment-free experience for everyone.

This project adopts the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/),
version 2.1. Unacceptable behavior may be reported to the maintainers at
security@szl-holdings.dev.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers are responsible for clarifying and enforcing standards and
will take appropriate corrective action in response to any behavior they deem
inappropriate.
